problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE assumes reference port names as expressions without proper type context
problems.minimal_edit: Replace each port name with a fresh AGREE variable declaration and corresponding assume statement

executor_steps: Declare new AGREE variables for each port in the annex
Replace each port name in assume statements with the corresponding new variable
Ensure all variable declarations are placed before any assume statements in the annex
